game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Lep's World - Jump n Run Games:** Players control Lep, a leprechaun, navigating 2D platformer levels using on-screen left/right directional buttons for movement and a dedicated jump button for vertical traversal. The objective is to reach the end of each of the 160 levels, spread across 6 distinct world themes, while collecting gold coins and avoiding 9 types of challenging enemies like angry bees. Lep starts with 3 health points and loses one upon contact with an enemy or environmental hazard, but can restore one health point by collecting a cloverleaf power-up. Progression involves clearing levels sequentially, unlocking new worlds, and competing for high scores in a "Tournament mode" or directly against other players in "Multiplayer capability" modes.
game_info.description: Guide Lep the Leprechaun through a colorful platformer adventure! Navigate through treacherous terrain, leap over chasms, and dodge dangerous enemies like angry bees and crawling beetles. Collect shimmering gold coins to boost your score and grab cloverleaf power-ups to restore your health. You start with 3 hearts - don't let them run out! Reach the flag at the end of each level to progress. Can you master all the challenges and achieve the highest score?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Left: Move left
Arrow Right: Move right
Space: Jump (hold for higher jumps)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to title screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and coin collection test. Tests that the player can move left/right, jump, collect coins, and navigate basic terrain without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move right continuously while jumping periodically to collect coins and avoid falling into pits. Maintain forward momentum to test basic platforming mechanics.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player should successfully move through the level, collect multiple coins, and reach the goal flag without game crashes or physics glitches. Test passes when GAME_OVER_WIN is achieved.

TEST_1.expected: Player should successfully move through the level, collect multiple coins, and reach the goal flag without game crashes or physics glitches. Test passes when GAME_OVER_WIN is achieved.

TEST_2.test_description: Optimal win strategy test. Tests the most efficient path to complete the level while maximizing coin collection and avoiding all hazards.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate using calculated jumps to land on platforms precisely, collect all accessible coins, avoid all enemies by timing movements, and reach the goal flag in the shortest time possible.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Player reaches GAME_OVER_WIN state with high score, all health points intact, and demonstrates mastery of jump timing, enemy avoidance, and optimal pathing through the level.

TEST_3.test_description: Health and power-up system test. Validates that health decreases on enemy contact and cloverleaf power-ups restore health correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally collide with enemies to lose health, then collect cloverleaf power-ups to restore health. Test the full health cycle from 3 hearts down to 1 and back up.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Health system works correctly - player loses hearts on damage, gains hearts from cloverleaves (max 3), and reaches GAME_OVER_LOSE when health hits 0.
TEST_3.description: Health and power-up system test. Validates that health decreases on enemy contact and cloverleaf power-ups restore health correctly.

TEST_4.test_description: Enemy interaction and avoidance test. Tests collision detection with different enemy types and validates proper player response to damage.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Navigate through areas with multiple enemy types, testing collision boundaries. Alternate between avoiding enemies and intentionally colliding to verify damage mechanics.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: All enemy collisions register correctly, player receives appropriate damage with invincibility frames preventing instant death, and enemies follow their movement patterns consistently.

TEST_5.test_description: Physics and pit falling test. Validates gravity, jumping mechanics, and proper game over condition when falling into pits.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Test various jump heights and distances, intentionally fall into pits to verify falling mechanics and game over condition, then test recovery by collecting health items.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Gravity feels responsive, jumps are controllable, falling into pits causes appropriate damage or game over, and platforming feels tight and predictable.
